# Build: Quiz module

Follows [docs/design/09-quiz.md](../design/09-quiz.md).

Built as part of the initial single-file app generation, including `quizData`, `buildQuiz()`, `answerQ()`, `showFeedback()`, `updateScore()`, `resetQuiz()`. Verified manually in-browser by answering all 10 questions and confirming score tally and reset. No deviations from design.

## Follow-up: docs structure retrofit (2026-06-29)

Added `docs/requirements/`, `docs/design/`, `docs/build/`, and `docs/prompt.md` retroactively to bring this repo's working style in line with the owner's other projects (requirements → design → build chain for every change going forward). No `index.html` changes in this follow-up — documentation only.
